ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Orazione del S.r Alessandro Guarini, Accademico Intrepido, Detto il Macerato
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Fatta in lode di D. Alderano Cybo Marchese di Carrara. E recitata publicamente nell` Accademia
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Included in Alessandro Guarini, Prose (Ferrara: V. Baldini, 1611). The emblem of the Accademia degli Intrepidi, and Guarini`s personal emblem as member of this academy, are both printed on the title page.

Dedicatees.ItacPersonItem: della Rovere,Francesco Maria II,Duke of Urbino,1549-1631

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
